summary: Good audience recording with strong Half Step > Franklin’s opener and Stranger segue; overall sound solid despite slight high‑end loss.
review: Both reviewers rate the show four stars, praising the collectible performance, especially the Half Step > Franklin’s opening and the added Stranger segue. The AUD source is noted as the best of the lot, though there is a bit of signal loss and reduced high end at the start of Half Step, and Jerry's vocals are described as marginal during this run.

ai_rating.rationale: Two reviews (both 4‑star) highlight a strong musical performance with minor vocal and tape‑age issues; recording is generally good but not flawless.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as the best capture among similar tapes, though there is some signal loss and high‑end roll‑off at the beginning of Half Step; overall fidelity is solid.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Collectible show with a strong opening (Half Step > Franklin’s) and an enjoyable Stranger transition; minor vocal issues noted but overall flow praised.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Vocals are marginal during this run, especially on the eighth track.
